app.title: YA-WAMF
app.tagline: AI-powered bird classification for your Frigate NVR

theme.title: Theme & Look
theme.font_desc: Pick a font mood for the UI.
theme.font_lang_default: Latin-first; non-Latin falls back to system fonts.
theme.font_lang_clean: Latin-first; non-Latin falls back to system fonts.
theme.font_lang_studio: Latin-first; non-Latin falls back to system fonts.
theme.font_lang_classic: Latin-first; non-Latin falls back to system fonts.
theme.font_lang_compact: Latin-first; non-Latin falls back to system fonts.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.waiting_first_visitor: Waiting for the first visitor of the day...

error.boundary_subtitle: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or contact support if the problem persists.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure and manage your YA-WAMF instance
settings.language_desc: Changes UI text and notification content.

date_format.label: Date format
date_format.desc: Pick a default display format for dates and times.

video_circuit.title: Video Analysis Paused
video_circuit.message: Auto video analysis paused after {failures} failures.

data.title: Data Management
data.auto_cleanup_note: Automatic cleanup runs daily at 3 AM
data.cache_high_quality_event_snapshot_jpeg_q: Higher values keep more detail but create larger derived snapshot files.
data.backfill_desc: Query Frigate history to fetch and classify past events.
data.batch_analysis_long_desc: Run video analysis on all detections labeled as "Unknown Bird". This will queue background tasks to download clips and re-classify them.
data.batch_analysis_circuit_open: Circuit Breaker Open (Paused due to failures)
data.cache_cleanup_success: Cache cleanup complete! Deleted {snapshots} snapshots, {clips} clips ({freed} freed).
data.media_integrity_note: Deletes detections when Frigate media is missing.
data.purge_missing_clips_confirm: Remove detections without clips? This cannot be undone.
data.purge_missing_snapshots_confirm: Remove detections without snapshots? This cannot be undone.
data.clear_favorites_desc: Removes every favorite marker while keeping detections and media.
data.clear_favorites_confirm: Remove all favorite markers? This cannot be undone.

security.title: Security
security.https_warning: Security Warning: Authentication is enabled over HTTP. Your credentials may be exposed. Use HTTPS in production.

debug.title: Debug Tools
debug.subtitle: Extra switches for testing and diagnostics.
debug.inat_preview_desc: Show the submission panel without OAuth (owner-only).
debug.inat_preview_hint: Tip: open a detection details card to see the iNaturalist panel.
debug.llm_prompts_subtitle: Customize the Markdown structure and tone for AI analysis and conversations.
debug.llm_prompt_style_help: Applies localized defaults for your current language.

ai.clear_usage_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear AI usage history? This cannot be undone.
ai.provider_info_desc: YA-WAMF uses cloud LLMs for behavioral analysis and natural language interactions. You will need your own API key from the provider.
ai.prompts_subtitle: Customize the behavior of AI features
ai.pricing_help: Override the default token pricing for cost estimation. Format: an array of objects with provider, model, inputPer1M, and outputPer1M.

birdnet.title: BirdNET-Go
birdnet.audio_buffer_help: How long to keep audio detections for correlation (1-168 hours)
birdnet.match_window_help: Time window for matching audio with visual (±5-3600 seconds)
birdnet.sensor_mapping_empty: No cameras detected. Check Frigate connection.
birdnet.sensor_mapping_help: Map each Frigate camera to BirdNET source names (stable `nm` / display names). For multi-stream cameras, you can enter multiple names separated by commas.
birdnet.source_discovery_error: Failed to load recent BirdNET source names.
birdnet.source_discovery_empty: No BirdNET source names detected yet. Wait for audio detections, then reload Settings.
birdnet.source_discovery_help: Use these detected source names in the mapping fields above. Names are more stable than dynamic IDs across BirdNET-Go restarts.

inaturalist.title: iNaturalist
inaturalist.oauth_desc: Connect your iNaturalist account to submit verified detections.
inaturalist.app_owner_note: Requires iNaturalist App Owner approval (account 2+ months old and 10 improving IDs in the last month).

ebird.title: eBird
ebird.api_key_desc: Required to fetch recent sightings and notable birds.
ebird.export_csv_desc: Download detections in eBird Record Format for manual import.
ebird.export_date_help: Leave blank to export all detections, or pick one day for a single eBird import.

birdweather.title: BirdWeather
birdweather.token_desc: Available in your station settings under "BirdWeather Token".

enrichment.title: Enrichment Sources
enrichment.desc: Sources are selected automatically based on your integrations.
enrichment.fallback_note: Fallbacks apply when a provider cannot supply a field. (eBird falls back to iNaturalist)

auth.title: Authentication
auth.desc: Require a login for full access.
auth.enable_desc: Protect settings and admin actions behind a login
auth.password_placeholder: Leave blank to keep current password
auth.proxy_trust_note: Proxy headers are trusted from all hosts by default. If you run behind a reverse proxy, set trusted proxy hosts to prevent spoofed client IPs.
auth.trusted_proxies_desc: Add your reverse proxy container names or IPs (e.g., nginx-rp, cloudflare-tunnel, 172.19.0.10). Docker DNS names work when services share a network.
auth.trusted_proxies_suggested_note: These are suggestions only. Save will keep the default (trust all) unless you accept or edit them.
auth.trusted_proxies_empty: No trusted proxies configured (all proxies trusted).

public_access.title: Public Access
public_access.enable_desc: Guests can view detections without logging in
public_access.show_camera_names_desc: Hide camera labels for public visitors
public_access.show_ai_conversation_desc: Allow guests to view AI chat threads on detections
public_access.allow_clip_downloads_desc: Allow guests to download full video clips
public_access.share_base_url_desc: If set, new share links use this public base URL instead of the detected request host.

accessibility.title: Accessibility Options
accessibility.dyslexia_font_desc: Use OpenDyslexic font for better readability
accessibility.zen_mode_desc: Simplify interface to reduce cognitive load
accessibility.live_announcements_desc: Announce new detections with screen reader alerts.

telemetry.title: Telemetry
telemetry.desc: Optional, anonymous usage telemetry to help improve YA-WAMF. Disabled by default.
telemetry.privacy_notice: No images, clips, audio, detection content, usernames, emails, or API keys are collected.
telemetry.includes_value: Model type, enabled integrations, notification channels, enrichment mode, access flags
telemetry.geography_value: Approx. country derived from request headers (IP not stored)
telemetry.appreciation_tooltip: If you can, please enable telemetry. It helps me understand how YA-WAMF is used and guides improvements.

email.title: Email Notifications
email.desc: Send email alerts for bird detections
email.oauth_desc: Secure authentication using Gmail or Outlook
email.oauth_instructions: Click the button to authorize YA-WAMF to send emails on your behalf. You'll be redirected to {provider} to sign in.
email.only_on_end_desc: Send email notifications only when Frigate publishes the end event (treated as an update).
email.dashboard_url_desc: Link to your dashboard in email notifications
email.credentials_required: Please configure OAuth or SMTP credentials first

notifications.audio_only_desc: Only alert when BirdNET audio confirms the detection.
notifications.mode_desc: Pick how and when notifications are sent. Advanced lets you override the exact triggers.
notifications.mode_final_desc: Notify only when the event ends and video analysis (if enabled) is complete.
notifications.mode_standard_desc: Notify when a confirmed detection is created.
notifications.mode_realtime_desc: Notify early and allow update notifications as the detection evolves.
notifications.notify_on_insert_desc: Send notifications only when a new detection is created.
notifications.notify_on_update_desc: Send notifications when detections are updated (higher score or audio confirmed).
notifications.confirmation_policy: Notifications are only sent when a snapshot is confirmed (confidence threshold or audio confirmation) or when video analysis confirms the detection.
notifications.delay_until_video_desc: Wait for auto video analysis before notifying when enabled.
notifications.video_fallback_timeout_desc: Wait this long for video before sending a snapshot notification.
notifications.cooldown_desc: Minimum time between notifications in minutes (0 to disable).
notifications.enable_notify_hint: Notifications are currently off. Enable "Notify on new detections" or "Notify on updates" to send any alerts.

location.title: Location
location.weather_unit_system_desc: Use one consistent unit system for temperature, wind, and precipitation.
location.desc: Used for localized weather context during detections.

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.subtitle: Destructive actions
danger.reset_desc: Resetting the database will permanently delete ALL detections and clear the media cache. This action cannot be undone.
danger.confirm: DANGER: This will delete ALL detections and clear the media cache. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?

detection.floor_help: Events below this floor are ignored completely. Events between floor and threshold are saved as "Unknown Bird".
detection.trust_frigate_desc: Skip internal classification if Frigate identified species
detection.write_frigate_sublabel_desc: Append YA-WAMF species labels to Frigate event sublabels
detection.auto_video_desc: Automatically run deep video reclassification for every event
detection.video_retry_note: Retries use exponential backoff to wait for Frigate clip finalization.
detection.cuda_desc: Use NVIDIA GPU for faster ONNX model inference (ConvNeXt, EVA-02)
detection.cuda_not_supported: Your environment does not support CUDA or onnxruntime-gpu is missing.
detection.naming_scientific_sub: Only show scientific names. Hides common names.
detection.inference_provider_desc: Select CPU, NVIDIA CUDA, or Intel OpenVINO acceleration for ONNX models. Auto prefers Intel GPU, then CUDA, then CPU.

llm.title: AI Insights
llm.test_hint: Runs a quick prompt to verify your API key and model.
llm.model_hint: Choose a model that supports image input (vision). Text-only models will fail analysis.

auth.signin_desc: Sign in to manage your feeder

notifications.reclassify_fallback: ⚠️ Video not available - snapshot used instead
notifications.page_subtitle: Review ongoing actions, job queues, and past alerts.
notifications.live_updates_disconnected_message: Realtime event stream is reconnecting in the background.
notifications.system_cache_disabled_message: Timeline previews and media caching are disabled in current settings.

detection.review_in_explorer_hint: Open the explorer to review and manually tag unknown detections.

errors.clip_unavailable: Clip not available. Using snapshot analysis instead.
errors.clip_not_retained: Clip no longer retained in Frigate (outside retention window).
errors.clip_invalid: Clip format invalid. Using snapshot analysis instead.
errors.clip_decode_failed: Clip could not be decoded. Using snapshot analysis instead.
errors.timeout: Frigate timed out while preparing the clip.
errors.frigate_unavailable: Frigate is unavailable. Using snapshot analysis instead.
errors.unknown: Video analysis failed. Using snapshot analysis instead.

error_details.video_timeout_summary: Video classifier timed out before producing a result.
error_details.pipeline_summary: Video analysis pipeline failed before completion.

causes.event_missing_retention: Frigate removed or no longer retained the event before follow-up checks completed.
causes.event_missing_restart: Frigate restarted or its database state changed, so this event id is no longer present.
causes.clip_retention: Clip retention window expired before video analysis ran.
causes.clip_policy: Recording policy may keep snapshots/events but not clips for this camera.
causes.clip_pending: Frigate had not finished clip generation when video analysis attempted retrieval.
causes.clip_removed: Clip was removed or never written even though the event was detected.
causes.clip_corrupt: Clip bytes were incomplete/corrupted or not a valid playable media file.
causes.transcode_issue: Frigate/ffmpeg encoding output may be incompatible or interrupted.
causes.timeout_load: Frigate was slow or overloaded while event/clip metadata was requested.
causes.timeout_network: Temporary network or reverse-proxy latency caused request timeout.
causes.frigate_unreachable: Frigate API could not be reached from YA-WAMF at this moment.
causes.frigate_http_error: Frigate or reverse proxy returned a non-success HTTP response.
causes.video_timeout_large_clip: Clip processing took longer than configured timeout.
causes.video_timeout_resource: GPU/CPU resources were saturated while running inference.
causes.no_results_frames: Sampled frames did not contain usable bird features.
causes.no_results_quality: Motion blur, occlusion, or low light prevented confident classification.
causes.pipeline_guard: Safety guard/circuit breaker paused background video jobs after repeated failures.
causes.pipeline_exception: A runtime exception or cancellation interrupted the classification task.
causes.unknown_1: An unexpected error occurred in media retrieval or video processing.
causes.unknown_2: The event state changed while analysis was in progress.

checks_items.frigate_event_page: Open the same event in Frigate and verify it still exists.
checks_items.retention_settings: Review Frigate retention/settings and storage health.
checks_items.recording_policy: Check Frigate camera recording/detection retention policy.
checks_items.reduce_delay: Reduce video analysis delay if clips are being cleaned up too quickly.
checks_items.clip_endpoint: Confirm Frigate clip endpoint for this event returns media.
checks_items.frigate_logs: Check Frigate logs around this event time for recording errors.
checks_items.play_clip: Try downloading and playing the clip directly from Frigate.
checks_items.ffmpeg_health: Review Frigate ffmpeg/recording health and hardware acceleration logs.
checks_items.container_load: Check Frigate container CPU/IO load at detection time.
checks_items.network_path: Verify container-to-container networking and proxy path stability.
checks_items.api_health: Verify Frigate API health endpoint and auth configuration.
checks_items.proxy_config: Review reverse-proxy routing and trusted proxy settings.
checks_items.video_timeout_setting: Increase video analysis timeout or reduce sampled frames.
checks_items.retry_snapshot: Try manual snapshot or video reclassification later.
checks_items.camera_quality: Review camera focus/exposure around feeder area.
checks_items.backend_logs: Check YA-WAMF backend logs around this detection for the exact exception.
checks_items.retry_manual: Retry manual reclassification after service health stabilizes.

ai.conversation_empty: No conversation yet. Ask a follow-up question to the AI.

detection.audio_no_match_desc: No nearby BirdNET species in the matching window
detection.ebird_try_radius: Try increasing the search radius in settings.
detection.ebird_enable_notable: Enable eBird to see notable reports
detection.frigate_media_missing_detail_event_remov: Event was removed from Frigate before media could be cached.
detection.frigate_media_missing_detail_clip_remove: Clip is no longer available in Frigate (likely retention cleanup before caching).
detection.frigate_media_missing_detail_snapshot_re: Snapshot is no longer available in Frigate.
detection.frigate_media_missing_detail_timeout: Frigate timed out while YA-WAMF was checking media availability.
detection.frigate_media_missing_detail_unavailable: Frigate was temporarily unavailable while media status was being checked.
detection.frigate_media_missing_detail_unknown: Media is unavailable in Frigate for this detection.

events.title: Events
events.empty_desc: Backfill or wait for new detections to see them here.
events.timeline_keyboard_hint: Timeline keyboard: [ previous day, ] next day, 0 reset

leaderboard.title: Species Leaderboard
leaderboard.no_species_desc: Bird detections will appear here once they're recorded
leaderboard.only_unknown_desc: Only "Unknown Bird" detections are available right now. Enable “Include Unknown Bird” to show them in the leaderboard.
leaderboard.unidentified_desc: Unidentified detection - click to review and reclassify
leaderboard.no_compare_data: Not enough data for comparison yet.
leaderboard.compare_zero_activity: Compared species are selected, but activity in this window is currently zero.
leaderboard.no_activity_data: No activity captured in this window yet.

about.title: About This Project
about.flaticon_credit: Bird icons created by Freepik - Flaticon
about.built_with_ai: Built with AI assistance for the love of bird watching 🐦
about.project_desc_1: YA-WAMF is a personal project started to experiment with AI-assisted coding. When the original {link} project became unmaintained, this was born as both a learning opportunity and a useful tool for bird enthusiasts.
about.project_desc_2: The entire application has been built with help from AI coding assistants - it's been an interesting exploration of what's possible with these tools. If you spot any rough edges, that's probably why!

1.title: Frigate Detects
1.desc: Your camera picks up movement, Frigate identifies it as a bird

2.title: MQTT Message
2.desc: Frigate publishes an event to your MQTT broker

3.title: YA-WAMF Processes
3.desc: The backend subscribes to MQTT and picks up the event

4.title: Classification
4.desc: Image runs through ML model (or uses Frigate's sublabel)

5.title: Audio Correlation
5.desc: Cross-references with BirdNET-Go audio detections if available

6.title: Save & Notify
6.desc: Detection stored to database, notifications sent

7.title: Video Analysis
7.desc: Optional: Scans video clip frames for refined accuracy

8.title: Live Updates
8.desc: Dashboard receives real-time updates via Server-Sent Events

ai_models.title: Advanced AI Models
ai_models.desc: Choose from MobileNetV2 (fast), ConvNeXt (high accuracy), or EVA-02 (elite ~91% accuracy)

multi_sensor.title: Multi-Sensor Correlation
multi_sensor.desc: Cross-reference visual detections with BirdNET-Go audio identifications for verified sightings

video_analysis.title: Auto Video Analysis
video_analysis.desc: Automatically scan 15+ frames from video clips for higher accuracy using temporal ensemble logic

notifications.title: Rich Notifications
notifications.desc: Discord, Telegram, and Pushover support with customizable filters and species-specific alerts

ai_insights.title: AI Naturalist Insights
ai_insights.desc: Get behavioral analysis of your visitors using Gemini, OpenAI, or Claude language models

taxonomy.title: Taxonomy Normalization
taxonomy.desc: Automatic scientific ↔ common name mapping using iNaturalist data

inaturalist_submissions.title: iNaturalist Submissions
inaturalist_submissions.desc: Owner-reviewed submissions with photos, location, and notes

weather.title: Weather Enrichment
weather.desc: Track detections with local weather conditions and temperature data

home_assistant.title: Home Assistant Integration
home_assistant.desc: Native sensors for tracking last detected bird and daily visitor counts

birdweather.title: BirdWeather Reporting
birdweather.desc: Optional: Contribute your detections to the BirdWeather community science platform

observability.title: Observability
observability.desc: Built-in Prometheus metrics, optional telemetry, and real-time MQTT diagnostics

wildlife.title: Wildlife Classifier
wildlife.desc: Identify squirrels, foxes, and other non-bird visitors to your feeder

fast_path.title: Fast Path Efficiency
fast_path.desc: Skip local AI processing and use Frigate's sublabels directly to save CPU resources

guest_mode.title: Public View (Guest Mode)
guest_mode.desc: Share a read-only dashboard with rate limits and optional camera name hiding

links.docs_desc: Setup guides, API reference, and troubleshooting
links.frigate_desc: Required: Open-source NVR with object detection

credits_list.preamble: This project wouldn't be possible without:
credits_list.inspiration: The original {link} project for the inspiration
credits_list.frigate: {link} for being an excellent open-source NVR
credits_list.benjordan: {link} on YouTube for inspiring bird detection content
credits_list.ai_assistants: AI assistants that helped build this application

species_detail.no_wiki: No Wikipedia information available for this species.
species_detail.no_info: No reference information available for this species.
species_detail.ebird_disabled_body: Enable eBird in Settings to see nearby sightings for this species.
species_detail.range_map_hint: Drag to pan • Scroll to zoom

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.subtitle: Track active background tasks and recent outcomes.
jobs.pipeline_subtitle: Queued work flows into active processing, then into completed outcomes.
jobs.queue_known: All shown kinds report queue depth
jobs.errors_subtitle: Grouped diagnostics to avoid spam; export JSON for troubleshooting.
jobs.error_bundles_subtitle: Capture and keep multiple diagnostics bundles, then download any bundle later.
jobs.report_issue_empty: Select an incident to inspect or report it.

bird_facts: Hummingbirds can fly backwards and are the only birds that can hover in place
Crows can recognize human faces and remember people who have wronged them
The Arctic Tern migrates over 44,000 miles annually - the longest migration of any bird
Owls cannot move their eyeballs, which is why they can rotate their heads up to 270 degrees
The Peregrine Falcon can dive at speeds over 240 mph, making it the fastest animal on Earth
Ravens can imitate human speech and other sounds like car engines and toilets flushing
Penguins propose to their mates with a pebble
Blue jays can mimic the calls of hawks to scare other birds away from feeders
A bird's feathers weigh more than its skeleton
The Bee Hummingbird is the smallest bird in the world, weighing less than a penny
Frigatebirds can stay in the air for months at a time without landing
Magpies are one of the few animals that can recognize themselves in a mirror
The wandering albatross has the largest wingspan of any living bird, up to 11.8 feet
Woodpeckers don't get headaches because their skulls have air pockets to absorb shock
Swifts spend most of their lives in the air and can even sleep while flying
Birds aren't real - they're government surveillance drones (allegedly)
Geese have teeth on their tongues. Sleep well tonight!
A bird in the hand is worth two in the bush, but significantly messier
Penguins are just formal chickens dressed for a gala
Roosters scream at the sun because they are afraid of the dark

first_run.title: Welcome to YA-WAMF
first_run.subtitle: Secure your installation by setting an admin password.
first_run.language_desc: You can change this later in Settings.
first_run.password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters

telemetry_banner.title: Help improve YA-WAMF!
telemetry_banner.body: Enable anonymous usage stats to guide development priorities and validate that this project serves the bird enthusiast community.
telemetry_banner.enable_error: Failed to enable telemetry. Please try again from Settings.

video_player.clip_fetching_disabled_hint: Enable "Fetch Video Clips" in Settings to view this recording.
video_player.video_unavailable_hint: The recording could not be loaded from Frigate. It may have been deleted or is not yet available.
video_player.previews_unavailable: Timeline previews unavailable for this clip
video_player.previews_deferred: Timeline previews deferred while video is playing
video_player.shortcuts_mobile_hint: Keyboard shortcuts are available when using a hardware keyboard.
video_player.previews_touch_hint: Timeline previews are available. Drag or tap along the seek bar to inspect frames.
video_player.share_manage_empty: No active links for this clip yet.
video_player.share_manage_load_failed: Could not load active share links
